[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows two people outdoors on sloped ground near a garden path, with one person reaching toward the other while both lie or sit beside a red-edged concrete area.  

Main Subject:  
A boy in a bright blue long-sleeve shirt sits on the right side of a sloped concrete strip, facing left. An adult lies on the left side of the strip with their head tilted back on grass and plants, while the boy’s arms extend toward the adult’s chest area.  

Setting:  
The scene is outdoors in a grassy yard or garden area, with many green plants and patches of ground covering the background. The concrete strip with red borders runs diagonally across the image, creating a slope. Lighting appears natural, suggesting daytime, though the exact time of day is unclear.  

Visual Details:  
The boy has dark hair and is wearing a bright blue top and dark pants with one foot visible near the concrete edge. The adult wears a dark, patterned headscarf or covering and a maroon garment, lying on their side or back with one arm bent near their chest. Surrounding vegetation includes broad-leaf plants and smaller green shrubs, with scattered small items or debris on the ground. The camera angle looks slightly elevated and angled down, focusing on the two people along the red-bordered concrete strip. Two black rounded rectangles with white text overlays appear on the image: one near the boy reads “gw” and another near the adult reads “gw jg”.  

Visible Text:  
gw  
gw jg  

Practical Summary:  
The photo shows a boy in a blue shirt sitting by a red-edged concrete strip while another person lies nearby among grass and plants. The boy’s arms are extended toward the other person, and the image includes black text overlays reading “gw” and “gw jg.”

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
